hooks.command: $f='C:\Users\gaspa\AppData\Local\Temp\claude_task_counter.txt'; $git='C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\Community\Common7\IDE\CommonExtensions\Microsoft\TeamFoundation\Team Explorer\Git\cmd\git.exe'; $n=0; if(Test-Path $f){$n=[int](Get-Content $f -Raw).Trim()}; $n++; if($n -ge 10){$n=0; Push-Location 'D:\Claude\gaspar_design'; & $git add -A; & $git diff --cached --quiet; if($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0){$ts=Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'; & $git commit -m "auto: checkpoint $ts"}; & $git push; Pop-Location}; Set-Content $f $n -Encoding UTF8
